_notes.usd_to_ngn: CLIENT DID NOT PROVIDE A USD RATE. 1600 is a placeholder default; update in admin panel. Only affects KUAILUZX + High-Power (USD FOB). Leilin is RMB and uses rmb_to_ngn=209.
_notes.cbm: KUAILUZX / High-Power CBM is ESTIMATED from container capacity (40HQ~76.3m3 else 20FCL~33.1m3 / units). Leilin CBM is computed from real carton packing dimensions. Verify KUAILUZX cartons before quoting freight.
_notes.formula: customer_price_ngn = (cbm * shipping_per_cbm_ngn) + profit_ngn + logistics_ngn + (fob_price * rate)  ; rate = rmb_to_ngn if RMB else usd_to_ngn
